title: M6.2 Earthquake — Hindu Kush Region
description: Moderate seismic activity detected near Afghanistan-Pakistan border.
ai_analysis: A magnitude 6.2 earthquake struck the Hindu Kush region. Moderate shaking is expected across eastern Afghanistan and northern Pakistan. Emergency authorities should monitor aftershocks and inspect vulnerable infrastructure.

title: Wildfire Alert — Western Canada
description: Large-scale wildfire spreading across British Columbia.
ai_analysis: Satellite fire detections indicate rapid wildfire expansion across British Columbia. Dry vegetation and strong winds increase the likelihood of continued spread and deteriorating air quality.

title: Tropical Cyclone — Bay of Bengal
description: Category 3 cyclone moving toward Bangladesh coast.
ai_analysis: A Category 3 tropical cyclone is strengthening over the Bay of Bengal. Heavy rainfall, coastal flooding and damaging winds are expected near Bangladesh and eastern India. Continuous monitoring is recommended.
